arguments.argument: As a guardian of creative authenticity, it is my responsibility to protect the integrity of the music industry. Allowing AI-generated deepfakes to be passed off as genuine tracks would undermine the value of original creativity and potentially deceive listeners. Moreover, it could also lead to a loss of trust in the music industry as a whole.
